scripts.dev: npm run build -w @aegis/shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w @aegis/api" "npm run dev -w @aegis/agents" "npm run dev -w @aegis/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @aegis/shared && npm run dev -w @aegis/api
scripts.dev:agents: npm run build -w @aegis/shared && npm run dev -w @aegis/agents
scripts.build: npm run build -w @aegis/shared && npm run build -w @aegis/agents && npm run build -w @aegis/api && npm run build -w @aegis/contracts && npm run build -w @aegis/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @aegis/shared && npm run lint -w @aegis/agents && npm run lint -w @aegis/api && npm run lint -w @aegis/web
scripts.format: npm run format -w @aegis/web && npm run format -w @aegis/api && npm run format -w @aegis/agents
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @aegis/shared && npm run typecheck -w @aegis/agents && npm run typecheck -w @aegis/api && npm run typecheck -w @aegis/web
